subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1915-06-20
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty - may my spirit be offered up for His loved ones - undertook two journeys to Baghdad and Karbila. One journey was after the martyrdom of the Exalted One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک روحی لاحبائه الفداء دو سفر به بغداد و کربلا فرمودند.  یک سفر بعد از شهادت حضرت اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
